questionHtml: The medical centre finds the actual number of positive results in their sample is different than predicted by the tree diagram. Explain why this might be the case.
markschemeHtml:
EITHER
sample may not be representative of population           A1

OR
sample is not randomly selected           A1

OR
unrealistic to think expected and observed values will be exactly equal            A1


[1 mark]

meta.title: The medical centre finds the actual number of positive results in their sample is different than predicted by the tree diagram. Explain why this might be the case.
